title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence and machine learning capabilities. Recognized for its innovative approach, Turing specializes in developing cutting\\-edge AI solutions that transform industries and empower organizations worldwide. With a focus on research and development, Turing collaborates with top\\-tier clients and partners to push the boundaries of what is possible with AI. The company fosters a dynamic and inclusive work environment, encouraging continuous learning, creativity, and collaboration among its talented team members. As a pioneer in the AI space, Turing is committed to building impactful solutions that address complex real\\-world problems and shape the future of technology.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our innovative team working on large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. This role is pivotal in building datasets that enable LLMs to effectively address realistic software engineering challenges. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in working with high\\-quality public repositories, particularly on GitHub, and possess hands\\-on experience in software development, environment automation, and code evaluation. Your contributions will directly influence the development of verifiable software engineering tasks, utilizing a synthetic approach combined with human\\-in\\-the\\-loop methodologies. This position offers an exciting opportunity to lead technical efforts, collaborate with research teams, and contribute to groundbreaking AI research initiatives.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will have a minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience in software engineering, with a strong proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript. You should be well\\-versed in version control systems such as Git, containerization tools like Docker, and familiar with setting up and managing software pipelines. A solid understanding of complex codebases, along with the ability to run, modify, and test real\\-world projects locally, is essential. Experience contributing to or evaluating open\\-source projects is highly desirable. Candidates should demonstrate excellent problem\\-solving skills, the ability to work independently and collaboratively, and a passion for AI and software development.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage GitHub issues across trending open\\-source libraries to identify challenges and opportunities for LLM evaluation.
* Set up and configure development environments, including Dockerization and environment management, to facilitate testing and development workflows.
* Assess unit test coverage and quality within repositories to ensure robust dataset creation and model evaluation.
* Modify and run codebases locally to evaluate the performance of LLMs in bug\\-fixing and code understanding scenarios.
* Collaborate closely with research teams to design and select repositories and issues that are challenging for LLMs, driving dataset diversity and quality.
* Lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative team environment and ensuring high standards of code quality and project delivery.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing provides the opportunity to work remotely from anywhere in the world, offering flexibility and work\\-life balance. You will be part of a forward\\-thinking organization at the forefront of AI innovation, working on impactful projects that influence the future of software development and AI research. The role offers competitive compensation aligned with your experience and contributions. Additionally, you will have access to a vibrant community of professionals, continuous learning opportunities, and the chance to collaborate with leading LLM companies and researchers. Turing also encourages a culture of innovation, diversity, and inclusion, ensuring every team member’s voice is valued and heard.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive environment for all employees. We celebrate diversity and are dedicated to creating a workplace that respects and values individual differences. We do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to these factors. We believe that a diverse workforce enhances innovation and drives success, and we are committed to providing equal opportunities for all candidates and employees.

title: Head of AI Full Stack Engineering - Global Software Product Company (Fully Remote)
description:
We are hiring a Head of AI Full Stack Engineering for a global enterprise software company. This is a hands\\-on technology leadership role for an exceptional engineer who can architect, build, and scale modern AI\\-native applications while leading engineering excellence across the organization.
 



 Unlike traditional architecture or management positions, this role requires active involvement in software development, system design, AI implementation, and engineering execution. You will work across the entire technology stack—from frontend experiences and backend services to cloud infrastructure, data platforms, AI systems, and autonomous agent frameworks. You will help shape the future of AI\\-powered software engineering by combining deep technical expertise with strong leadership and execution capabilities.
 


 Key Responsibilities
 * Lead the design, development, and evolution of enterprise\\-grade AI\\-powered products and platforms.
* Architect and build scalable full\\-stack applications using modern frontend, backend, cloud, and AI technologies.
* Drive the adoption of AI\\-native software development practices across engineering teams.
* Design and implement LLM\\-powered applications, AI workflows, agentic systems, copilots, and intelligent automation solutions.
* Define technical standards, architecture principles, coding guidelines, and engineering best practices.
* Participate directly in software development, code reviews, architecture reviews, debugging, and technical problem\\-solving.
* Build and optimize distributed systems, APIs, microservices, data pipelines, and cloud\\-native platforms.
* Establish high standards for code quality, automated testing, CI/CD, security, observability, and operational excellence.
* Evaluate emerging AI technologies, frameworks, and tools, translating them into practical business and engineering outcomes.
* Mentor senior engineers and technical leads while fostering a culture of ownership, innovation, and continuous learning.
* Partner closely with product, design, and business stakeholders to translate complex requirements into scalable technical solutions.
* Drive engineering productivity through intelligent automation, AI\\-assisted development, and modern developer experience initiatives.


 Qualifications
 * 12–20\\+ years of software engineering experience with significant experience in full\\-stack architecture and technical leadership.
* Proven track record of building and scaling complex enterprise software products.
* Deep hands\\-on expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, .NET, React, modern web architectures, APIs, and distributed systems.
* Strong experience designing and developing cloud\\-native applications on AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Practical experience building AI\\-powered applications using LLMs, RAG architectures, vector databases, AI agents, MCP, orchestration frameworks, or related technologies.
* Strong understanding of software architecture patterns, system design, scalability, security, and performance engineering.
* Experience leading engineering teams while remaining actively involved in coding and technical delivery.
* Demonstrated ability to modernize legacy applications and build next\\-generation platforms.
* Strong knowledge of DevOps, CI/CD, infrastructure automation, automated testing, and platform engineering.
* Excellent communication, technical leadership, and stakeholder management skills.
* Passion for leveraging AI to fundamentally improve how software is designed, developed, tested, and delivered.


 Preferred Qualifications
 * Experience building agentic AI platforms, autonomous workflows, AI copilots, or developer productivity solutions.
* Experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP), AI tool orchestration, and agent frameworks.
* Background in enterprise SaaS, platform engineering, or large\\-scale B2B software products.
* Experience working with globally distributed engineering teams.
* Open\\-source contributions, technical thought leadership, or AI product development experience.


 Important Notice
 
**This is a highly hands\\-on engineering leadership role. We are looking for immediate joiners or candidates who can join within a maximum of 2 weeks. Please apply only if you meet this availability requirement. Candidates with longer notice periods will not be considered.**

title: Data Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises deploying advanced AI systems. Turing supports customers in two ways: first, by accelerating frontier research with high\\-quality data, advanced training pipelines, plus top AI researchers who specialize in coding, reasoning, STEM, multilinguality, multimodality, and agents; and second, by applying that expertise to help enterprises transform AI from proof of concept into proprietary intelligence with systems that perform reliably, deliver measurable impact, and drive lasting results on the P\\&L.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced Software Engineers (SWE Bench – Data Engineer / Data Science) to join our team and contribute to benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects focused on real\\-world data engineering and data science workflows. This role involves hands\\-on work with production\\-like datasets, developing robust data pipelines, and performing data science tasks to evaluate and enhance the performance of cutting\\-edge AI systems. The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in data engineering and data science, with the ability to work seamlessly across data preparation, analysis, and model\\-related workflows within complex codebases. You will collaborate closely with researchers and engineers to design and implement challenging data tasks that mirror real\\-world scenarios, ensuring our evaluation processes are rigorous, reproducible, and scalable.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate must possess a minimum of three years of experience as a Data Engineer, Data Scientist, or Software Engineer with a focus on data workflows. Proficiency in Python is essential for scripting, data processing, and analysis tasks. Demonstrable experience working with both structured and unstructured data is required, along with a solid understanding of machine learning and data science fundamentals. Candidates should have experience navigating and modifying complex, real\\-world codebases, ensuring the creation of clean, maintainable, and well\\-documented code. Strong problem\\-solving skills, especially regarding algorithmic or data\\-intensive challenges, are critical. Excellent communication skills in English, both spoken and written, are necessary to collaborate effectively with multidisciplinary teams.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work with structured and unstructured datasets to support SWE Bench\\-style evaluation tasks, ensuring data quality and relevance.
* Design, develop, and validate data pipelines that are used in benchmarking and evaluation workflows, ensuring robustness and scalability.
* Perform data processing, analysis, feature engineering, and validation to support various data science use cases.
* Write, optimize, and troubleshoot Python scripts to process data and facilitate experiments in local environments.
* Assess data quality, transformations, and outputs for accuracy, correctness, and reproducibility, maintaining high standards.
* Create clean, well\\-documented, and reusable data workflows that can be integrated into benchmarking processes.
* Participate in code reviews to uphold high standards of code quality, readability, and maintainability.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to design and implement challenging, real\\-world data engineering and data science tasks for AI systems evaluation.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing as a freelancer offers the flexibility to work remotely from anywhere, providing an excellent work\\-life balance. You will have the opportunity to engage with some of the most innovative AI projects in the industry and collaborate with leading LLM companies, gaining valuable experience in frontier AI research and deployment. This role is ideal for professionals seeking to expand their expertise in data workflows and AI evaluation methodologies while maintaining autonomy over their work schedule. Additionally, Turing provides a supportive environment that encourages continuous learning and professional growth, with access to a global community of AI experts.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse work environment. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. We believe that diverse perspectives and backgrounds are essential to driving innovation and excellence in AI research and development. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any protected characteristic.

title: Looking  For Sr. Software Engineer/Tech Lead Java Full Stack
description:
HI
 



  





 Greetings
 



  





**Company Description** 




  





 OmVrti.ai is building a Vertical Agentic AI Operating System to transform complex enterprise workflows into coordinated, autonomous decision\\-making. The company addresses the fragmentation caused by disconnected systems, static rules, and manual coordination by deploying AI agents that plan, execute, and optimize decisions across cost, timing, policy, suppliers, employees, and compliance. With a mission to serve $9T\\+ enterprise ecosystems, OmVrti.ai aims to turn transactions into real\\-time collaboration among companies, suppliers, employees, and customers. Backed by deep vertical supply\\-chain experience and proprietary go\\-to\\-market access, the company is starting with corporate travel, a $1\\.8T high\\-friction workflow. Its AI agents help enterprises reduce spend by up to 30%, improve compliance, cut administrative friction, boost productivity, and enhance the traveler experience.
 



  





**Role Description** 




  





 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site role based in New Delhi for a Sr. Software Engineer / Tech Lead (Java Full Stack).
 



  





 You will design, develop, and maintain scalable, secure full\\-stack applications using Java and modern front\\-end technologies, with a strong focus on performance and reliability. You will lead architectural discussions, define technical roadmaps, review code, and mentor engineers to ensure high\\-quality delivery. Day\\-to\\-day responsibilities include translating product requirements into technical solutions, integrating with third\\-party services, writing clean and testable code, and troubleshooting production issues. -

 Dharmendra Singh

**Benefits**

title: Junior Software Engineer (Open 3D Engine) - Remote
description:
* Role: Junior Software Engineer (Open 3D Engine)
* Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere)
* Payout: $20 \\- $120/hour



  





**Role Overview:** 




 We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Junior Software Engineer (Open 3D Engine) to work on a contractual basis. This person will play a pivotal role in training next\\-generation AI systems for 3D environments by designing, developing, and implementing interactive 3D scenes and simulations using Open 3D Engine (O3DE). The work will involve leveraging O3DE expertise to generate high\\-quality, synthetic data, enabling AI models to learn, reason, and construct high\\-performance, AAA\\-quality digital worlds.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 • Design, develop, and implement interactive 3D scenes and simulations using Open 3D Engine (O3DE) for AI training purposes.
 



 • Leverage the full suite of O3DE tools, including Atom Renderer, Component Entity System, Gems, and Asset Processor, to create high\\-fidelity, effective environments.
 



 • Collaborate with the customer’s team to transform conceptual ideas into finished AI training workflows and simulations.
 



 • Integrate Python and C\\+\\+ scripts for enhanced functionality and automation within O3DE projects.
 



 • Utilize AWS services to support robust, scalable 3D simulation deployment and asset management.
 



  





**Required Skills \\& Qualifications:** 




 • Hands\\-on experience with O3DE (Open 3D Engine), including a deep understanding of core tools and asset workflows, is required for this role.
 



 • Proficiency in Python and C\\+\\+ for 3D scene development and automation is necessary, with the ability to write efficient and effective code.
 



 • Experience building interactive 3D environments from concept to completion, tailored for simulation and AI training, is essential for success in this position.
 



 • Familiarity with Atom Renderer, Component Entity System, Gems, and Asset Processor within O3DE is highly desirable, as well as strong written and verbal communication skills.
 



 • Basic knowledge of AWS infrastructure is also required, with the ability to utilize AWS services to support 3D simulation deployment and asset management.
 



  





**More About the Opportunity:** 




 This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Artificial Intelligence industry, contributing to the development of next\\-generation AI systems for 3D environments. The successful candidate will have the opportunity to work on high\\-impact projects, collaborating with a team of experts to transform conceptual ideas into finished AI training workflows and simulations, and will be part of a growing network of experts contributing to the development of frontier AI models.

title: .NET Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Boltin is a forward\\-thinking financial technology company dedicated to transforming the lending landscape through innovative software solutions. With a focus on delivering robust, scalable, and compliant loan management platforms, Boltin serves a diverse client base across banking, non\\-banking financial institutions, and lending organizations. Our commitment to excellence and technological advancement positions us as a leader in the fintech industry, continuously striving to enhance the efficiency and transparency of lending operations globally.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Software Engineer with a specialized background in loan management and servicing platforms to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will lead the development and enhancement of our enterprise loan management systems, focusing on consumer and commercial lending modules. Your expertise will be crucial in designing, implementing, and maintaining complex loan servicing workflows, ensuring they meet regulatory standards and client requirements. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in developing scalable solutions for loan processing, repayment scheduling, payment processing, and arrears management, with a particular emphasis on compliance and automation. This position offers an excellent opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge financial technology solutions that impact millions of borrowers and lenders worldwide.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* 8\\+ years of overall software development experience with 4\\+ years hands\\-on in loan management / loan servicing platforms
* Proven experience in developing loan servicing modules on enterprise LMS platforms
* Deep understanding of consumer lending products such as personal loans, two\\-wheelers, auto loans, and home loans, as well as commercial lending including SME, LAP, equipment finance, and working capital
* Exposure to Australian vehicle and equipment finance, including chattel mortgage, finance lease, hire purchase, and novated lease servicing
* Strong knowledge of settlement processing, payout figure calculation, and disbursement handling
* Experience in developing repayment schedule engines supporting EMI, P\\&I, balloon, interest\\-only, and irregular repayment structures
* Expertise in payment processing systems, including direct debit, ECS/NACH/auto\\-debit, with handling dishonours and retry logic
* Familiarity with arrears and overdue management, including automated dunning, escalation procedures, and hardship variations
* Experience with collections workflows such as bucket\\-wise staging, field collections, legal referrals, and enforcement tracking
* Knowledge of NPA classification, repossession, asset surrender, and security enforcement processes
* Understanding of write\\-off procedures, provisioning, deficiency balance management, and recovery posting
* Experience with charge and hypothecation registration, search, and release processes
* Proficiency in regulatory reporting, credit bureau integration, and compliance\\-driven audit trail management
* Strong analytical, problem\\-solving, and communication skills, with the ability to work collaboratively in a fast\\-paced environment


**Responsibilities**
 As a Senior Software Engineer at Boltin, your responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Leading the design, development, and enhancement of loan management and servicing modules within our enterprise LMS platform
* Implementing complex repayment scheduling engines supporting various repayment structures and ensuring accuracy and compliance
* Developing and maintaining payment processing workflows, including handling direct debits, ECS/NACH transactions, dishonour management, and retry logic
* Managing arrears, overdue, and collections workflows, including automated dunning, escalation, and legal referral processes
* Ensuring the integration of regulatory reporting, credit bureau data, and audit trail management to meet compliance standards
* Collaborating with cross\\-functional teams to gather requirements, translate them into technical specifications, and deliver scalable solutions
* Providing technical leadership and mentorship to junior team members, fostering best practices and continuous improvement
* Participating in code reviews, testing, and deployment activities to maintain high\\-quality standards
* Staying updated with industry trends and regulatory changes impacting loan management and servicing processes


**Benefits**
 At Boltin, we value our employees and offer a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your professional growth and personal well\\-being. Our benefits include competitive salary packages, health insurance coverage, flexible working hours, and opportunities for continuous learning and development. We also provide a collaborative and inclusive work environment that encourages innovation, recognition, and career advancement. Additionally, employees have access to wellness programs, performance incentives, and a range of employee engagement activities aimed at fostering a positive workplace culture.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Boltin is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, religion, sexual orientation, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We believe in providing equal employment opportunities to all qualified candidates and are dedicated to creating an environment where everyone can thrive and contribute to our collective success.
